result_block:
## Result

- **Brick**: depgraph
- **Mode**: native
- **Mini-task**: Find all non-test source files in `packages/core/` that import from `injector/container.ts` (fan-in analysis)
- **Answer**:
  ```
  test-repo/packages/core/exceptions/base-exception-filter-context.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/exceptions/external-exception-filter-context.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/guards/guards-context-creator.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/helpers/external-context-creator.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/inspector/graph-inspector.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/interceptors/interceptors-context-creator.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/middleware/container.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/middleware/middleware-module.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/middleware/routes-mapper.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/nest-application-context.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/nest-application.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/nest-factory.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/pipes/pipes-context-creator.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/router/router-exception-filters.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/router/router-explorer.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/router/routes-resolver.ts
  test-repo/packages/core/scanner.ts
  ```
- **Turns used**: 9
- **Tools used**: Read, Bash, Grep
- **Rough token estimate**: ~3,500
- **Notes**: Files inside `injector/` itself (e.g., `instance-loader.ts`, `module.ts`) use relative paths like `./container` rather than `injector/container`, so they are not caught by the `injector/container` string search — this is consistent with how the `fanin` brick tool would resolve paths (it would use the actual module resolution, not just string matching). The `repl/repl-context.ts` imports via the barrel `../injector` index rather than directly from `container.ts`, so it is correctly excluded from direct fan-in results.
mini_task_spec:
Using the depgraph brick's **fan-in** capability, find all non-test TypeScript source files in `test-repo/packages/core/` that directly import from `test-repo/packages/core/injector/container.ts`. Specifically, these are `.ts` files (excluding `.spec.ts` test files and any files under `test-repo/packages/core/test/`) whose content contains the text `injector/container` as part of an import specifier (i.e., files that reference `../injector/container`, `../../injector/container`, etc.). List all matching file paths relative to `test-repo/`, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

---
